sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56750" key="keratessei=s" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κερατεσσεῖς·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἱ τοὺς ταύρους ἕλκοντες ἀπὸ τῶν κεράτων· καλοῦνται δὲ καὶ</foreign> </entryFree>
